# agentic-hooks

> A Second Brain orchestration CLI built on Go ADK v2. A Search agent and a
> self-correcting Generator↔Review loop answer a task against a personal
> knowledge base of engineering principles, gated by a human approve/reject
> checkpoint. The same knowledge base is exposed as an MCP server so external
> agent hosts (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) can query it directly over stdio.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention: a
Markdown index of every document in this project, organized so an LLM agent
can decide what to fetch. For the same index with every document's full
content already inlined, see [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt).

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Start-here doc for any agent picking up this repo cold — build/test/run commands, conventions, full doc map.
- [README.md](README.md): Human-facing project overview, quick start, architecture diagram.
- [SESSION_HANDOFF.md](SESSION_HANDOFF.md): Cross-session context, locked decisions, open items — read before resuming work.

## Agent collaboration policy

- [POLICY.md](POLICY.md): The collaboration policy index — read before the Second Brain.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Auto-loaded gate summarizing the highest-severity policies.
- [policies/01-agent-conduct.md](policies/01-agent-conduct.md)
- [policies/02-session-context-compaction.md](policies/02-session-context-compaction.md)
- [policies/03-memory-persistence.md](policies/03-memory-persistence.md)
- [policies/04-caching.md](policies/04-caching.md)
- [policies/05-persona-by-project.md](policies/05-persona-by-project.md)
- [policies/06-guardrails-security.md](policies/06-guardrails-security.md)
- [policies/07-env-secrets-protection.md](policies/07-env-secrets-protection.md)
- [policies/08-anti-cheating-honesty.md](policies/08-anti-cheating-honesty.md)
- [policies/09-communication-style.md](policies/09-communication-style.md)
- [policies/10-escalation-hitl.md](policies/10-escalation-hitl.md)

## Agent-legible root files

- [SYSTEM.md](SYSTEM.md): Architecture overview, component responsibilities, data flow.
- [MEMORY.md](MEMORY.md): Durable project-level facts and decisions.
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md): How Second Brain concepts are authored, tagged, and matched.
- [PLAN.md](PLAN.md): Current forward-looking roadmap.
- [DESIGN.md](DESIGN.md): Standing design principles.
- [PRODUCT.md](PRODUCT.md): What this tool is for, and its two real personas.
- [APPEND_SYSTEM.md](APPEND_SYSTEM.md): Append-only project changelog.

## Tutorials

- [docs/tutorials/first-run.md](docs/tutorials/first-run.md): Your first run — clone, build, create a Second Brain concept, run the loop, approve a verdict.

## How-to guides

- [docs/how-to/add-a-concept.md](docs/how-to/add-a-concept.md): How to add a Second Brain concept.
- [docs/how-to/point-search-at-another-mcp-server.md](docs/how-to/point-search-at-another-mcp-server.md): How to point the Search agent at a different MCP server.
- [docs/how-to/run-benchmarks.md](docs/how-to/run-benchmarks.md): How to run benchmarks.
- [docs/how-to/run-the-golden-set-eval.md](docs/how-to/run-the-golden-set-eval.md): How to run the golden-set eval.
- [docs/how-to/test-with-mcp-inspector.md](docs/how-to/test-with-mcp-inspector.md): How to test the MCP server manually with MCP Inspector.

## Reference

- [docs/reference/cli.md](docs/reference/cli.md): Every CLI subcommand and flag.
- [docs/reference/mcp-tools.md](docs/reference/mcp-tools.md): `list_knowledge` / `get_knowledge` MCP tool schemas.
- [docs/reference/second-brain-frontmatter.md](docs/reference/second-brain-frontmatter.md): OKF frontmatter fields for `knowledge/*.md`.
- [docs/reference/makefile-targets.md](docs/reference/makefile-targets.md): Every Makefile target.

## Explanation

- [docs/explanation/why-adk-not-genkit.md](docs/explanation/why-adk-not-genkit.md): Why ADK Go v2, not Genkit, is the runtime.
- [docs/explanation/self-correcting-loop.md](docs/explanation/self-correcting-loop.md): Why the Generator↔Review loop is built the way it is.
- [docs/explanation/hitl-design.md](docs/explanation/hitl-design.md): Why HITL is a CLI prompt, not ADK tool-confirmation.
- [docs/explanation/architecture-overview.md](docs/explanation/architecture-overview.md): Full architecture walkthrough with diagrams.

## Optional

- [TESTING.md](TESTING.md): 3-tier manual/automated testing guide.
- [docs/superpowers/specs/](docs/superpowers/specs/): Original design specs (Second Brain orchestration, documentation overhaul).
- [docs/superpowers/plans/](docs/superpowers/plans/): Implementation plans.
- [knowledge/](knowledge/): The Second Brain content itself (Markdown, OKF frontmatter).

## Deliberately not covered

Excalidraw and draw.io diagrams were requested but are out of scope this
pass — neither MCP server is connected in this project's environment, and
fabricating a tool connection that doesn't exist was rejected in favor of
Mermaid (inline, GitHub-native) and D2 (rendered to SVG via the local `d2`
CLI). Revisit if those MCP servers are ever connected. A real historical
ticket/code-review log is also not included — this repo has no issue
tracker connected; `APPEND_SYSTEM.md` starts from real dated entries and
fills going forward.
